text: Loved it!! Went here with my wife's parents and had one if the skillet breakfasts with chorizo. Couldn't even finish it all, it was piled with chorizo, hash browns, eggs, salsa, and cheese...absolutely delicious!! The place was like a little mom and pop place out of the Midwest, felt right at home. The waitress was very friendly and the prices were great, will be back here very soon!!
